generation.effective_prompt: Transform the uniform clay pose guide into one small adult beagle dog with a stocky anatomically normal body, a coherent dark-toned tricolor short coat with a tricolor pattern, drop ears, and an upright white-tipped tail. The input is an authoritative geometry and pose guide, not an appearance reference. Replace every clay surface with one coherent photorealistic breed-appropriate coat while preserving the authored neutral rigging pose pixel-for-pixel in silhouette. Preserve the straight untwisted torso and the fixed moderate three-quarter side view of exactly thirty degrees. Do not rotate toward an exact side, front, rear, or a stronger angle. Preserve exactly four anatomically connected legs and four complete paws. The two front paws and the two hind paws must occupy four distinct non-overlapping image positions with visible background gaps between every lower-leg silhouette. Preserve the authored opposite fore-aft offsets of the far-side front and hind legs without turning them into a walking stride. Keep all four paws planted flat on the same horizontal ground line. Keep the head and neck aligned with the torso, keep the belly closed and continuous, keep exactly one tail detached from the torso silhouette, preserve full-body framing, and use a plain background. This is a static symmetric binding reference, not an action pose. Avoid: exact side view with hidden far limbs, front view, rear view, three-quarter angle above forty degrees, perspective distortion, twisted torso, curved spine, head turned toward camera, head turned away from camera, tilted head, walking, running, gait stride, lifted paw, crouching, sitting, lying down, uneven ground, crossed legs, overlapping lower legs, overlapping paws, merged legs, fused legs, hidden leg, hidden paw, duplicated leg, extra limb, fifth limb, missing limb, splayed legs, open belly, belly hole, disconnected paw, stretched foot, malformed paw, duplicate tail, extra tail, abdominal appendage, cropped body, fused tail, collar, scarf, accessory, gray clay patch, untextured patch, plastic patch, background geometry, text.
generation.negative_prompt: exact side view with hidden far limbs, front view, rear view, three-quarter angle above forty degrees, perspective distortion, twisted torso, curved spine, head turned toward camera, head turned away from camera, tilted head, walking, running, gait stride, lifted paw, crouching, sitting, lying down, uneven ground, crossed legs, overlapping lower legs, overlapping paws, merged legs, fused legs, hidden leg, hidden paw, duplicated leg, extra limb, fifth limb, missing limb, splayed legs, open belly, belly hole, disconnected paw, stretched foot, malformed paw, duplicate tail, extra tail, abdominal appendage, cropped body, fused tail, collar, scarf, accessory, gray clay patch, untextured patch, plastic patch, background geometry, text
